name: Cool Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Cooked Arrowhead Mills 7 Bean & Barley (drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cooled 7 Bean & Barley with remaining ingredients in a large salad bowl.
2. Toss lightly.
3. Serve Cold.
NOTE: The recipe (as published) seems to be missing the unit of measure for the Sesame Oil. I would guess that it should be '1/4 cup'. -K.M.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "Homestyle 7 Bean & Barley Soup Mix" tri-fold
